head.hi: The Commission to Negotiate Peace to the Acting Secretary of State

div.p: 3115. Following for President Wilson from Emir Feisul, dated Egypt July 9.

quote.p: “At this great historic moment I beg to tender to your highly esteemed person and to the American nation my sincerest and most heartfelt congratulations and wishes on signing the Peace through your personal efforts and the valuable support of your noble nation. Justice has secured a brilliant victory and your efforts have been crowned with success. I pray The Almighty to make it a complete and everlasting peace for the world.”
